calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2007 Off Calendar

Application And Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Greater Bay Bank's application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Application And Ntc Of Application For Writ Of Possession
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Greater Bank's application for a writ of possession is granted. The requirement of an undertaking is waived pursuant to CCP Section 515.010(b). Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
